use_cases: Displaying customer testimonials with user avatars and quotes
Building social proof sections on landing pages
Creating review sections for product or service pages
Adding user feedback displays to marketing websites
Showcasing client testimonials in portfolio or case study pages
ai_summary: A testimonials display component featuring user avatars with fallback support, using Radix UI primitives for accessibility. Displays customer quotes with profile images and names in a clean, minimal layout suitable for social proof sections on landing pages and marketing websites.
